item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Lightly creamed gnocchi piccata with a hint of lemon and capers, topped with afresh fennel salad with Italian herbs. White beans in olive oil on the side(1+6+11+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Filipino Pancit — sautéed rice vermicelli noodles with deep umami and flavour,topped with roasted vegetables and tofu. Lime, crispy fried onion and garlic onthe side (7)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Cannelloni filled with creamy ricotta and fresh spinach, baked in a rich tomatosauce and silky béchamel (1+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Cannelloni filled with creamy ricotta and fresh spinach, baked in a rich tomatosauce and silky béchamel (1+6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Mexican baked tamale with beans and vegetables, served with esquites — acreamy Mexican corn salad — and topped with fresh herbs. Jalapeños, lime andpico de gallo on the side (1+2+6+15)
